topic: A kitchen junk drawer fills with one new unfamiliar key every morning.
title: A New Key Appears In My Junk Drawer Every Morning | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My junk drawer fills with unfamiliar keys, one new key every morning.
scenes.image_prompt: an open kitchen drawer full of assorted old keys, dim overhead light, deep shadow inside the drawer, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have lived in this apartment for six quiet years.
scenes.image_prompt: a small tidy apartment kitchen at dusk, low warm light, long shadows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The drawer holds batteries, takeout menus, rubber bands.
scenes.image_prompt: a cluttered junk drawer with batteries and menus and rubber bands, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One Monday a brass key I did not own sat on top.
scenes.image_prompt: a single old brass key resting on top of drawer clutter, harsh angled light, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I thought a friend had left it.
scenes.image_prompt: a hand holding a brass key up to a window, dim gray light behind, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But the next morning there were two. The morning after, three.
scenes.image_prompt: a small pile of mismatched keys on a wooden counter, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: So I counted them and locked the drawer each night.
scenes.image_prompt: a closed kitchen drawer with a small padlock, dim kitchen, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every morning the lock held, and a new key waited inside.
scenes.image_prompt: an open locked drawer revealing one extra shining key, harsh light from above, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One key was warm, like it had just been pulled from a pocket.
scenes.image_prompt: a hand cupping a single key, warm glow, dark surroundings, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then I tried the newest key on my own front door. It turned.
scenes.image_prompt: a key inserted into a front door lock from inside a dark hallway, dim light, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every key in that drawer opens this apartment.
scenes.image_prompt: a kitchen drawer overflowing with dozens of keys, dim light, long shadow across the floor, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Which means somewhere, that many people can let themselves in.
scenes.image_prompt: a dark apartment hallway seen from inside, the front door slightly ajar, fog beyond, vertical 9:16 framing
